items.title: IND vs AFG one-off Test: Rishabh Pant dismissed for 81 as India reach 475 for 6
items.summary: Pant did play his signature strokes but also curbed his natural instinct to go after each delivery, treating each ball on its merit during his 121-ball knock
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: India march ahead despite Saleem's strikes, Pant misses out on century
items.summary: India lost three wickets in the morning session, of Gill, Jurel and Pant
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Are Portugal better without Ronaldo - and is he un-droppable?
items.summary: As Cristiano Ronaldo prepares for his sixth World Cup with Portugal, BBC Sport take a closer look at his place in the team.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
